creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
One bug is for base, the other is for the port.  I don't know if we actually plan to try and ship 1.1.1 in base for 12.0, or just 1.1.0.  If the latter, that doesn't help this bug.  (And even if we actually ship 1.1.1 for 12.0, we still need a port version of 1.1.1.)

So I don't think they're duplicates, exactly.  I don't feel strongly one way or the other about tracking everything in the other PR.  If you and Bernard want to do that, we can do that.
